---
title: "Publications"
---

## 2026

### Bias Correction and Statistical Transfer of Satellite Annual Maximum Precipitation Series in the Piura River Basin, Peru

**Ramirez, J. I., & Berrocal, B. F.**

*Ingeniería del Agua*

DOI: [10.4995/ia.24476](https://doi.org/10.4995/ia.24476)

### Comparative Analysis of Traditional Models and Machine Learning for Daily Streamflow Infilling in Representative Peruvian Basins

**Ramirez, J. I., & Berrocal, B. F.**

*Tecnología y Ciencias del Agua*

DOI: [10.24850/j-tyca-18-02-02](https://doi.org/10.24850/j-tyca-18-02-02)
